method: discover_candidates.py mega-harvest: 27 tuned organoid-type queries (quoted synonyms + method clause) over Europe PMC OA full-text, cursorMark paginated, deduped against ALL existing candidate pools + corpus
epmc_ceiling_note: Europe PMC has 14,273 organoid-protocol OA full-text papers by combined-query hitCount; per-type union harvested 18,483 NEW (broader synonym coverage). 57,749 organoid OA full-text papers exist if the method-precision clause is dropped.
